knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-039-Executive-Command-Center Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: CC-016 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: CC-001 Command activation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Command activation | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-002 Role assignment | Governance | Require documented compliance: Role assignment | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-003 Incident source validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Incident source validation | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-004 Situation report | Governance | Require documented compliance: Situation report | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-005 Action ownership | Governance | Require documented compliance: Action ownership | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-006 Priority validation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Priority validation | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-007 Escalation | Corrective | Escalate by severity/age | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-008 Communication approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Communication approval | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-009 Decision authority | Governance | Require documented compliance: Decision authority | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-010 Timeline integrity | Governance | Require documented compliance: Timeline integrity | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-011 Evidence links | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Evidence links | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-012 Resource tracking | Governance | Require documented compliance: Resource tracking | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-013 Cross-domain status | Governance | Require documented compliance: Cross-domain status | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-014 AI command prohibition | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI command prohibition | Critical | AI Governance. CC-015 External message approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: External message approval | Critical | Corporate Secretary. CC-016 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | High | Security. CC-017 Emergency access logging | Governance | Require documented compliance: Emergency access logging | High | Corporate Secretary. CC-018 Shift handoff | Governance | Require documented compliance: Shift handoff | High | Corporate Secretary. CC-019 Closure approval | Preventive | Reject/block if not satisfied: Closure approval | High | Corporate Secretary. CC-020 After-action review | Governance | Require documented compliance: After-action review | High | Corporate Secretary. CC-021 Board updates | Corrective | Escalate to Board | High | Board. CC-022 Notification integration | Governance | Require documented compliance: Notification integration | High | Corporate Secretary. CC-023 Workflow integration | Governance | Require documented compliance: Workflow integration | High | Corporate Secretary. CC-024 Recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Corporate Secretary. CC-025 Audit trail | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Audit trail | High | Corporate Secretary.
